across_seed_t_ci.caveat: n=3 seeds; per this project's convention (CLAUDE.md) small-n lacks significance and can settle nothing on its own -- this across-seed t-CI is reported as a conservative cross-check, not as the headline statistic. The headline is the per-seed superiority check (at least one seed's OWN stored CI excludes chance).

summary.honest_verdict: Speaker readout is LOW in absolute terms (mean 0.033 vs chance 0.011, ~3x chance over 91 classes) AND significantly ABOVE chance in at least 2/3 seed(s) individually (that seed's own stored bootstrap CI excludes chance from below) -- the frozen omni-embed's pooled vector is NOT speaker-free. 'No speaker information' / 'speaker never written to the pooled vector' / 'measured-zero paralinguistic spread' are RETIRED as descriptions of this artifact; the accurate statement is 'low but non-zero, and significantly non-chance in at least one seed.' The n=3-seed across-seed t-CI [0.0034, 0.0633] is more conservative and spans chance (directional-only, underpowered at this seed count) -- it does not contradict the per-seed superiority finding, it simply cannot itself establish the mean is above chance at this small n.
retired_phrasings: speaker never written to the pooled vector
summary.superiority_and_equivalence_going_forwar: Per ticket #34: any future 'near chance' / 'no X information' claim about this representation must report BOTH a superiority test (does the CI exclude chance) AND an equivalence test (TOST-style against a pre-declared SESOI) -- a claim of 'no signal' is not supported merely because a point estimate ratio-over-chance looks small, nor is 'has signal' supported merely because a ratio-over-chance is > 1x without a CI check.

per_seed.interpretation: CI [0.0067, 0.0433] includes chance 0.011 -> not significant at this seed (does not exclude chance)
CI [0.0133, 0.05] lower bound 0.0133 > chance 0.011 -> significantly ABOVE chance at this seed
CI [0.0267, 0.07] lower bound 0.0267 > chance 0.011 -> significantly ABOVE chance at this seed

config.method: Per-seed: compare the FROZEN artifact's own stored bootstrap CI lower bound to the frozen chance value (no CI recomputation). Across-seed: one-sample t-CI (n=3, directional-only) on the stored per-seed test_acc values.
config.note: This script performs NO model inference and NO dataset access; it recomputes statistics from paralinguistic_negative_probe.json alone (frozen, not rerun).
